data.title: Pepperstone wins four major global awards, including Overall Best Forex Broker of 2026. Leading online broker.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, on January 29th, 2026, Pepperstone, a global CFD provider, began the year on a high note by securing four prestigious international awards. This achievement solidified their position as a top online broker. Among the accolades received was the honor of being named the Overall Best Forex Broker for the year 2026, highlighting their exceptional performance in the industry. This success serves as a testament to Pepperstone's dedication to excellence and quality service.
Partial US shutdown seems increasingly likely amid stand-off over ICE-scmp

data.title: Donald Trump Jr. celebrates World Liberty Financial's stablecoin hitting $5 billion market cap, showcasing success of USD1.
data.description: Donald Trump Jr., a co-founder of World Liberty Financial, expressed excitement as the dollar-pegged World Liberty Financial USD (USD1) stablecoin soared to a $5 billion market capitalization on Wednesday. Trump Family celebrates USD1's Success as Trump Jr. shared a CoinMarketCap screenshot to showcase the milestone. Emphasizing its American roots and real-world scalability, Trump Jr. credited the stablecoin's success to a focus on infrastructure rather than distractions. He tweeted, "USD1 just hit a $5B market cap. Crafted in America, primed for global utilization, and embraced by reputable entities." Eric Trump, Trump Jr.'s brother and co-founder, also commemorated the milestone. Further details are available on Benzinga.com.
AUD Strengthens 0.5% to Reach $0.7076

data.title: Xsolla SPAC 1 priced $200M IPO with 20M units at $10 each, trading on Nasdaq under symbol "XSLLU" from Jan 29, 2026.
data.description: Xsolla SPAC 1, a special purpose acquisition company, has priced its initial public offering of 20,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant; the whole warrant can be exercised for one share at $11.50. Trading on Nasdaq under ticker symbol "XSLLU" begins January 29, 2026. After separation, Class A shares and warrants will trade under symbols "XSLL" and "XSLLW." The offering is set to close on January 30, 2026, pending usual conditions.

data.title: Worldcoin surges 40% on news of OpenAI's biometric X competitor in development by a small team, using ChatGPT and biometrics for proof-of-personhood.
data.description: Sources have revealed that a compact group is working on a platform that might incorporate ChatGPT for generating content and utilize biometrics for verifying individual identity.

data.title: MegaETH mainnet launches Feb. 9 with 35K TPS in testing, surpassing Ethereum's 10-year history with 10.7B transactions.
data.description: MegaETH's stress test witnessed a record-breaking 10.7 billion transactions, surpassing the total number of transactions processed by the Ethereum blockchain over its 10-year existence.

data.title: Senators question AG on closure of DOJ crypto unit as illicit crypto activity sees 162% increase in 2025.
data.description: Six senators from the United States pointed out a substantial 162% increase in illegal cryptocurrency activities in the year 2025. They used this statistic to support their argument against the Department of Justice's decision to dismantle its cryptocurrency enforcement unit.

data.title: Dow Jones futures drop as Meta rises, Microsoft falls; Elon Musk plans Tesla capex surge after huge earnings reports.
data.description: After the stock market hit record highs, Tesla, Microsoft, and Meta reported substantial earnings. Dow Jones Futures saw a decrease as Meta's stocks surged and Microsoft's stocks declined. Elon Musk plans to boost Tesla's capital expenditures significantly.

data.title: BODY20 introduces 6-week transformation program with personalized EMS training, body composition tracking, and nutrition support.
data.description: A new program utilizing data analysis spans over six weeks, incorporating tailored Electro Muscle Stimulation (EMS) workouts, tracking of body composition, and dietary guidance. Recently introduced in Newport Beach, California on Jan. 28, 2026, the initiative is spearheaded by BODY20, renowned for its expertise in providing personalized EMS training for individuals and small groups.

data.title: HYPE token surges 60% amid Hyperliquid DEX growth, staking and open interest up. Sustainability of rally questioned.
data.description: The value of the HYPE token from Hyperliquid surged by 60% due to a significant increase in staking activity and open interest. Although this spike in performance is noteworthy, certain fundamental aspects related to decentralized exchange (DEX) operations cast doubts on the sustainability of the rally in the long run.

data.title: Tech browser developer Brave is exploring social heist puzzles to attract users to Web3 gaming, aiming to boost engagement and users.
data.description: A browser developer known for prioritizing privacy is currently conducting trials to determine whether incorporating gamification could attract new users to Web3 gaming.
